posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the menu here:

Screenshot 2024-06-07 at 14.15.44576×542 28.8 KB

The “App features” & “Pricing” both open in a modal, so really, the “Give feedback” link could too, if it was a monday WorkForm.

This would be simple to implement and keep users focused.

It would also be a nice enhancement.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @dvdsmpsn!

I turned this into a request
